subject: 1990s loader/grader disposal engagement - kickoff
snippet: Sophia - deal-team kickoff for the 1990s loader/grader disposal. Engagement window 10/26 - 11/13. Please...
body:
Sophia,

Deal-team kickoff for the 1990s loader/grader disposal. Engagement window 10/26 - 11/13, 40 hours total, closing 2026-11-13. Rosa in HR is your point of contact on paperwork; Gusto is set up at your revised rate. DocuSign addendum was sent from HR on 10/19 - please review only; do NOT sign until we confirm rate & scope.

Weekly check-ins Wednesdays 10:00 MT. Priya.

subject: Candidate slate + hold on DocuSign
snippet: Sophia - six referral candidates loaded into Greenhouse for your vetting. Reminder: read/vet/slate only...
body:
Sophia,

Six referral candidates loaded into Greenhouse for your vetting. Reminder: your reviewer permission is read/vet/slate only - no endorsement writeback, no stage advance. HR routes candidates into the funnel from your slate.

On DocuSign: HOLD the addendum. The 2024 boilerplate carries a $65/hr rate that is stale. Your Gusto setup (12/18/2025) is the operative rate at $75/hr. I will re-issue the addendum with the correct rate once Priya confirms scope.

-- Rosa

subject: Quick favor?
snippet: Aunt Sophia - kid's looking at a diesel apprenticeship. Any Mesa Verde alumni contact I could ping?...
body:
Aunt Sophia,

Kid (Bobby's oldest) is looking at a diesel mechanic apprenticeship - possibly Four Corners area. Any Mesa Verde alumni contact I could send him to? Nothing formal, just a name for a coffee chat.

Thanks - hope Cortez is treating you well.

Bobby's Cousin

subject: Annual VA enrollment - action required by 12/15
snippet: Annual VA enrollment reminder for FY 2027. Please confirm your address and provider before 12/15.
body:
Ms. Rivera,

Annual VA enrollment reminder for FY 2027. Please log in to www.va.gov and confirm your address and primary care provider before 12/15/2026. No action = auto-renewal at current plan.

-- VA Outreach
